rulings.Case Title: CYNTHIA JOAN FARMER et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION To Compel San Jose Water Company To Produce Its Custodian Of Records And Person Most Knowledgeable For Deposition And To Produce Documents At Deposition And Request For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Tuesday, June 22, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Plaintiff¿s motion to compel San Jose Water Company to produce its custodian of records and person most knowledgeable for deposition and to produce documents at deposition and request for monetary sanctions is continued to July 1 on the court¿s own motion. Plaintiffs and San Jose Water Company are required to engage in further meet and confer in an effort to reach agreement on a deposition date and the scope of the deposition and the documents to be produce. If plaintiffs and San Jose Water Company have not resolved all issues raised by the motion before then, by 4pm on June 30 they must, without further argument, send an email to contestasbestostr@sftc.org stating what issues remain for decision and then appear at the hearing at 9:00 a.m. on July 1. =(220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: THERESA HINKLE et al VS. A.W. CHESTERTON COMPANY, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION To Compel Pltfs To Provide Responses To Specially Prepared Interrogatories To Pltfs, Set One, Requests For Production And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Tuesday, June 22, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 2. Defendant General Electric Company¿s motion to compel responses to specially prepared interrogatories; requests for production and request for sanction is off calendar at the request of the moving party. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: CHARLES AIKINS VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Crane Co.¿S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Provide Responses To Discovery Regarding Bankruptcy Trusts
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Tuesday, June 22, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 3. Defendant Crane Co¿s request that plaintiff be required to provide responses to discovery regarding bankruptcy trusts is granted. If the discovery attached as exhibit C to Mr. Tuohy¿s declaration is served on plaintiff, plaintiff will be required to provide full and complete substantive responses to that discovery. = (220/HEK)
